title: Best Hotels in Phuket Thailand (2026)
meta_description: Curated Phuket hotel guide with area-based picks for beach stays, Old Town stays, and higher-end resort trips.
intro: Phuket hotel planning works best by area, not by star count alone. These picks are chosen to help different trip styles: resort-heavy luxury, quieter north-side stays, a smarter Old Town base, and higher-end options that avoid the most chaotic parts of Patong.

items.name: The Slate
items.description: A design-led resort choice near Nai Yang, best for travelers who want a quieter north-side Phuket stay with more personality than a generic chain resort.
items.current_info: Best for: north-side beach stay • Style: design resort • Source: official hotel website

items.name: COMO Point Yamu
items.description: A strong east-coast luxury base if you want a polished resort stay away from the island's busiest west-coast tourist zones.
items.current_info: Best for: calm luxury trip • Style: polished resort • Source: official hotel website

items.name: Rosewood Phuket
items.description: A premium option for travelers who want high-end service and a luxury resort feel close to the Patong side without sleeping in its busiest core.
items.current_info: Best for: luxury near Patong side • Style: premium resort • Source: official hotel website

items.name: Trisara
items.description: One of Phuket's strongest resort-first answers if your hotel is a major part of the trip rather than just a base between activities.
highlights: Best if resort time is central
items.current_info: Best for: ultra-luxury resort stay • Style: villa resort • Source: official hotel website

items.name: The Memory at On On Hotel
items.description: A better choice than a resort if your Phuket trip is about Old Town food, architecture, and a shorter cultural stay rather than a beach-only plan.
items.current_info: Best for: Phuket Town stay • Style: heritage boutique • Source: official hotel website
